mappings.reason: Addressing unauthorized software by removing it from use directly satisfies the requirement to disable prohibited client run time technologies.
Application allowlisting technically enforces the prohibition of unauthorized executables, directly disabling prohibited technologies.
Allowlisting authorized libraries controls a component-level subset of runtime execution, addressing a specific technical subset of client run time technologies.
Allowlisting authorized scripts controls script execution engines, addressing a specific type subset of client run time technologies.
Restricting execution to supported browsers and email clients covers a specific application subset of client run time technologies.
Restricting unauthorized browser and email extensions addresses a component subset of client run time technologies.
